sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18594" key="a)fusmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀφυσμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n18594.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drawing off,</tr_> of liquids, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
